ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Industry to which the company belongs */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "num_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the company */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue of the company */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company reporting the data */,
  "female" REAL /* Percentage of female employees */,
  "male" REAL /* Percentage of male employees */,
  "white" REAL /* Percentage of white employees */,
  "asian" REAL /* Percentage of Asian employees */,
  "latino" REAL /* Percentage of Latino employees */,
  "black" REAL /* Percentage of Black employees */,
  "multi" REAL /* Percentage of multi-racial employees */,
  "other" REAL /* Percentage of other ethnicities */,
  "undeclared" REAL /* Percentage of undeclared ethnicity */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect demographic data */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date the demographic data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_data_collection_method FOREIGN KEY ("data_collection_method") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("method_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the employee works for */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Gender of the employee */,
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Ethnicity of the employee */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Job role of the employee within the company */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee belongs to */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "salary_range" TEXT /* Salary range of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_ethnicity_id FOREIGN KEY ("ethnicity_id") REFERENCES ethnicities ("ethnicity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the job role (e.g., Software Engineer, Product Manager) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the job role */,
  "role_category" TEXT /* Category of the job role (e.g., Technical, Non-Technical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ethnicities" (
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethnicity */,
  "ethnicity_name" TEXT /* Name of the ethnicity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ethnicity */,
  "ethnicity_category" TEXT /* Category of the ethnicity (e.g., Asian, Hispanic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethnicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender category */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gender category */,
  "gender_category" TEXT /* Category of the gender (e.g., Male, Female, Non-Binary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry_types" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry type */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry type (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry type */,
  "industry_category" TEXT /* Category of the industry (e.g., Tech, Finance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., HR, Executive, Analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company for which the report is generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Content of the report in a structured format */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was given */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* The actual feedback text provided by the user */,
  "feedback_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the data is updated (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection method */,
  "method_description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection method */,
  "method_category" TEXT /* Category of the data collection method (e.g., Primary, Secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)
